operator_surfaces.repository_preview: FastAPI operator console and governance-record API

chatgpt_site.landing_route: Institutional doctrine, architecture, lifecycle, and readiness disclosure
chatgpt_site.authenticated_route: ChatGPT-sign-in command room with a deterministic no-execution action lab

implemented_control_scope: Persistent identities, agent contracts, capability grants, and venture budgets
Deny-by-default R0-R4 action evaluation outside language models
Deterministic minimum risk floors and action-window validation
Independent human approval and dual-control checks for R3 and R4
Immediate policy re-evaluation before human execution records are accepted
Portfolio, venture, identity, and action-type kill switches
Claims, evidence, verification, execution, and outcome records with reconstruction
Append-only application API with a SHA-256 audit hash chain
One canonical authenticated web application and operator console
demonstrated_capabilities: Run deterministic local opportunity and portfolio simulations
Accept the versioned DALEOBANKS OpportunityPacket compatibility contract
Record bounded governance and evidence workflows in a relational database
Deny missing identity, contract, capability, evidence, budget, approval, rollback, and kill-switch requirements
Reconstruct an action from evidence through policy, approval, human execution, and independent verification
Validate the normative UAT artifacts and governed preview through repository tests
Publish an owner-access institutional website and ChatGPT-authenticated deterministic action lab that performs no external side effect
limitations: AG0 still requires independent review; the complete AG1 and AG2 acceptance gates have not cleared
The audit hash chain is application-enforced and has not yet been anchored to an independent immutable store
Database schema creation is suitable for the preview; versioned production migrations and recovery exercises remain open
The in-process rate limiter and local preview identities are not distributed enterprise controls
The operator console stores its preview bearer token in browser session storage; it is not an enterprise session architecture
The deterministic action-risk taxonomy is bounded and is not a complete production action registry
The ChatGPT website is a separately deployed presentation and simulation surface; it does not read or mutate the FastAPI governance database and is not a production control-plane client
Immediate reauthorization governs system records but cannot prevent a human from acting outside the system
No isolated agent runtime, tool gateway, secrets broker, egress control, Venture Pod, or worker factory exists
No venture has been proven through paid, repeatable operation by this repository
No model or heuristic is calibrated to predict venture failure probability
Legacy financial, market, compliance, agent-performance, and risk values may be fixtures or operator inputs and are not independently audited
No output authorizes autonomous spending, contracting, publication, deployment, hiring, legal representation, or another external action
prohibited_claims: empirical failure probability derived from a heuristic score
legal or regulatory compliance without qualified review and evidence
complete AG1, AG2, secure, autonomous, production-grade, or enterprise-ready operation before the relevant acceptance gate clears
